query:
UPDATE stories SET custody_days = 1150 WHERE id = 60001;
SELECT 
  DATEDIFF(NOW(), '2023-03-12') as days_since_arrest,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE public_status = 1 AND review_status = 'approved') as public_docs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM actors) as total_actors,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM timeline_events) as total_events,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public_records_requests) as total_prrs;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2N1WTErRdSjheBh.e46440e12186 --database 3yhU3DrKzf8Z5BNtvxatFF --execute 
UPDATE stories SET custody_days = 1150 WHERE id = 60001;
SELECT 
  DATEDIFF(NOW(), '2023-03-12') as days_since_arrest,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE public_status = 1 AND review_status = 'approved') as public_docs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM actors) as total_actors,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM timeline_events) as total_events,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public_records_requests) as total_prrs;
